text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, fam! ☆ You all right?! You ready to party or
what?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Bet! I'm still just learning how to party, though, so
you've gotta take the lead!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to become a true partyer, Mejiro Palmer
heads out to town with Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with some clothes! If I'm gonna make
my party debut, I've gotta really look the par—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Look at that outfit! It's got party
blowers all down the back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Are they supposed to fan out like a peacock's tail
when you blow on them or something? Hm... I'm
not a little kid, so I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's gooo! Try it on! It'd be hilarious! ☆ I'm
gonna see if I can pull it off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! You're seriously gonna wear that?! Hold
on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Bwahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, I'm dead! It's so bad it's almost good!
Haha! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeeyyy! ♪ It's so hilarious, I don't even care
if it looks terrible! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's all good as long as we're having fun, right?
Just look at how hard you're laughing! ★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right... I guess it's not all about
whether something looks good or not. It's about
how happy it makes you too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I never should've doubted you, bestie! Show me
the way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Honeyade, huh? I come here sometimes, but is
there an extra-dope way to order or something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, uh, "Hey, can I get a tall regular honeyade,
extra rich?" or something?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ♪ I'll have the usual. ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
One honeyade, with, with, and with! Plus royal
jelly, double plus super-fat whip, hold the ice,
please and thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? What language was that?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! Here, try some. It's my own
special blend!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp, gulp...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: How's it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Holy cow, that's sweet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My heart is pounding like crazy! Is this really even
honeyade?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahaha! ☆ Good, right? Amps you up, right?
What did it taste like to you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno. Like, I seriously have no idea. Maybe like
someone poured pure syrup over a field of
flowers? Something like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I feel like my whole world's changed! So
this is Helios's honeyade...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wanna go hype up Tracen Academy? Oh, who's
that?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Digiii! ☆ What's good, fam?! How's that
otaku life?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaah, Helios, my beloved sun goddess! You're
looking shooo lovely todaaay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As for me, nothing really special has happened.
Just cried myself to sleep once or twice...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just got a notification yesterday that I couldn't
get a ticket for an event I wanted to go to...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, was it for like a party or something?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, bestie, why don'tcha give her your usual
pick-me-up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
On it! Aw, that's really too bad, but there's
nothing you could've done. You win some, you
lose some. But if you look at it another way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, sold out events are proof of just how
popular your oshis are. Doesn't knowing that
make you make you feel a little better?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and if they stream the event, we can have a
viewing party! It'll be a riot.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... em... gee! C-c-could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Are you one of those fabled party girls that are
nice to otakus?! I never thought I'd be blessed to
meet such a goddess at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I-I wouldn't say I'm nice... I'm just not fully there
yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, anyway, if we're gonna turn that frown upside
down and get the party started, wanna start off
with a selfie?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-a-a selfie?! Yes! I'd love to get a selfie with
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Digital
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they go on like this for the rest of the
day...

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That was lit, Palmster! ☆ We really laughed the
day away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I had a ton of fun! Thanks, Helio!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this is the same world I was living in
before!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Isn't there only, like, one
world?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The town and the academy are the same as
they've always been. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's wild that just changing how you look at things
can affect how you feel so much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My mind's, like, totally blown, and I am so here
for it! Life is good!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! ☆ I know it goes without saying, but
you're just getting started too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, it's you and me, baby, just
laughing and slaying races! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We're the only ones winning now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Bet! That's all I want too! Just you and me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's just keep ramping up the fun! On and off the
track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What is this picture she posted?!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: What is the matter, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's just that Palmer seems to be fooling around
even more than usual as of late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be training properly... but I still
cannot help but be concerned.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I understand your anxiety. However, please leave
her be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure, Grandmother? We don't need to
worry about her?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
It isn't that I am not worried about her. There is
simply no need to intervene.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Let her do as she pleases. That's what it means to
become independent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is breaking all the preconceptions
of what it is to be a Mejiro by letting loose, but
the Mejiro family doesn't interfere.
